creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT-FIX-MAINTAINER TIME OUT : x11/bricons

        According to:

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/bad.html

        The port bricons has an unfetchable distfile.  After doing some
looking around it appears that the suffix has been changed from .tar.gz to
.tar.Z.  The md5 for the file is also different.  I don't know why the
changed happened.  I've put together a small patch to fix this in the
ports collection at:

http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/bricons.diff

** NOTE ** 

I emailed the maintainer, shanee@augusta.de, on Sat, 6 Jan 2001 about this
patch and have recieved no response.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN bricons bricons.new
From : /usr/ports/x11
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/bricons.diff
----------------------------------------------------------------
